---
about:
  template: trestles
  id: contact-block
  image: ../img/adam15.jpg
---

::: {#contact-block}

## Get in touch!<br>We'd love to hear from you.

Email: [adam@seathrough.science](mailto:"Adam Smith"<adam@seathrough.science>)

Phone: [+64-21-0383941](tel:+64-21-0383941)

**Based on Auckland's Hibiscus Coast, New Zealand (NZST, UTC+12/13)**

---

### What to include in your message

- A brief description of your project or question
- The type of data you have
- Your timeline or any key deadlines
- Any specific methods, tools, or outputs you have in mind

---

### Find us online

- [{{< iconify fa6-brands google-scholar >}} Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=5OvrU9IAAAAJ)
- [{{< iconify fa6-brands github >}} GitHub](https://github.com/anhsmith)
- [{{< iconify fa6-brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/adam-smith-1a723532/)

:::
